title: Evangelion pickup lines
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion pickup lines > . >             Quote Post by Kaworu Nagisa » Sat Aug 05, 2006 10:15 pm 1. Wanna come over to my place and we can initiate some human instrumentality? 2. Is that the fourth angel in your pocket? Or are you just happy to see me? 3. Time for attack. Let me insert the entry plug into your eva and fill it up with viscous fluids. 4. I think blue haired chix are hot. 5. When your Liltih comes into contact with my Adam we'll get ready for third impact. 6. I have a fetish for crazy, red headed, comotose german girls. 7. Ever do it in a room full of 12 talking monoliths before? 8. You must be an angel, cuz you've turned me into orange mush. 9. Wanna see my Lance of Longinus? 10. AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAGH !

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat Aug 05, 2006 10:54 pm What's scarier than those lines, is the image I get when I think of the kind of women who they'd work on.

[]: Re: Evangelion pickup lines > . >             Quote Post by narcosis219 » Sun Aug 06, 2006 3:29 am Kaworu Nagisa wrote: 6. I have a fetish for crazy, red headed, comotose german girls.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Aug 06, 2006 6:40 am I would pay to watch people try and use those lines on real girls I would also give ten to one odds that the girls who pounce on those lines have STD's.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Aug 06, 2006 11:27 am What is "STD"? :S @Timstuff Yeah. They don't have names, just codes; it is easier to identify them that way. *Looks for a big-big burf bag.*

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Sun Aug 06, 2006 11:34 am FauÃŸtin wrote: What is "STD"? :S

(Lit: "to confirm that I was here") Thus: "Hey baby, wanna come back to my place and 'prove that you exist'?!"

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Sun Aug 06, 2006 1:10 pm well, looks like i have something to do during the summer holidays now....i'm so glad i have private health care.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Sun Aug 06, 2006 4:14 pm Quite a perverted one here but "I'd sure like to put my lance through your A.T. Field"

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Aug 06, 2006 4:23 pm Or "It wouldn't be too hard for me to penetrate your AT-Field for good." How perverted people are... Including me... :P "I have a lot of twin sisters who are dying to meet you." Or "I have a lot of twin sister who have a good apetite, if you get what I'm saying..." /:twisted: "I have a tall horny friend, but he has a wierd name... Something like Shougouki or whatever..." This is sick... and crap... But its fun!
